entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (38) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029).
MODIFICATION DESCRIPTION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO PROVIDE ADDITIONAL PERSONAL IDENTITY VERIFICATION (PIV) TOKENS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (39) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
"CRITICAL FUNCTION"
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID, IN ACCORDANCE WITH SECTION 2212 OF THE HEALTH CARE AND EDUCATION RECONCILIATION ACT OF 2010 (PUB.L. 111-152, 124 STAT. 1029).
MODIFICATION DESCRIPTION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REPLACE THE PRICING SCHEDULES THAT WERE PREVIOUSLY REVISED VIA MODIFICATION 0037.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA11D0012 (3) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD INDIANA SECONDARY MARKET FOR EDUCATION LOANS, INC. (ISM) AS A KEY SUBCONTRACTOR FOR MOHELA WITHIN SECTION B.12.N.15 OF THE CONTRACT.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL EFFECT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
